title: Government Procurement Approval
description: A government procurement approval workflow where a purchase request is submitted by a requester, reviewed by a procurement officer for budget availability and compliance, then approved or rejected by a department head. Approved requests proceed to purchase order generation.

actors.description: Procurement officer who verifies budget availability and compliance
Department head who approves or rejects the purchase request
System that generates purchase orders for approved requests

draft.description: Purchase request is being prepared by the requester.

transitions.description: Requester submits the purchase request for procurement review.

pendingReview.description: Purchase request is under review by the procurement officer for budget availability and compliance.

transitions.description: Procurement officer has verified budget availability and compliance; request proceeds to department head for approval.
Procurement officer rejected the request due to budget or compliance failure.

pendingApproval.description: Purchase request awaiting approval or rejection by the department head.

transitions.description: Department head approves the purchase request.
Department head rejects the purchase request.

approved.description: Purchase request has been approved by the department head; system generates purchase order.

transitions.description: Purchase order has been generated by the system.

completed.description: Purchase order has been generated and the workflow is complete.

requestSubmitted.description: Purchase request has been submitted by the requester.

budgetVerified.description: Budget availability and compliance have been verified by the procurement officer.

purchaseOrderIssued.description: A purchase order number has been issued.

requestTitle.description: Short title or summary of the purchase request.

requestDescription.description: Detailed description of the goods or services being requested.

requestAmount.description: Total monetary amount of the purchase request.

departmentId.description: Identifier of the department submitting the request.

remainingAnnualBudget.description: Department's remaining annual budget at time of review.

budgetAvailable.description: Whether sufficient budget is available for this request (requestAmount <= remainingAnnualBudget).

complianceVerified.description: Whether the request meets procurement compliance requirements.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was submitted.

reviewedBy.description: Identifier of the procurement officer who reviewed the request.

reviewedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was reviewed.

approvedBy.description: Identifier of the department head who approved the request.

approvedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was approved.

rejectedBy.description: Identifier of the actor who rejected the request.

rejectionReason.description: Reason provided for rejecting the purchase request.

purchaseOrderNumber.description: Purchase order number assigned by the system upon approval.

status.description: Current status label for the procurement request.

purchaseRequest.description: Formspec definition for the purchase request form submitted by the requester.

procurementReview.description: Formspec definition for the procurement officer's review form including budget verification.

approvalDecision.description: Formspec definition for the department head's approval or rejection form.
